sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלו שׁילו שׁלה שׁילה

Transliteration: shı̂ylôh shilôh shı̂ylô shilô

Phonetic: shee-lo'

BDB Definition:

Shiloh = "place of rest"
  1. a city in Ephraim and temporary home of the Ark of the Covenant and the Tabernacle, the place where Samuel grew up

Origin: from the same as H7886

TWOT entry: 2376

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
